text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first concert is finally upon us.<n>Smart Falcon
raises the stakes for<n>herself, saying she needs to
make it<n>a success in order to attract more
supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I remind her that concerts are meantto be fun for everyone involved,after which she takes the stage witha smile on her face and a jump in her step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out in the audience, I spot Agnes<n>Tachyon and
Silence Suzuka, as well<n>as Mihono Bourbon, who
dropped by<n>the day before.
